compiled_state.title: Implement --attest flag in record-test-status.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> flag to record-test-status.sh. When --attest is provided, the script:
1. Reads the source worktree test-gate-status from <worktree-artifacts-dir>/test-gate-status
2. Verifies the source status is "passed" (exits non-zero if missing, failed, or stale)
3. Verifies the source diff_hash is consistent with the worktree branch content
4. Computes the current session diff hash via compute-diff-hash.sh
5. Extracts tested_files from source and unions with locally-required tests for session-side staged files
6. Writes a new test-gate-status to the session artifacts dir with: status=passed, diff_hash=<current>, timestamp, tested_files=<union>, attest_source=<worktree-id>
7. Skips all test discovery and execution when --attest is provided

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh

### Implementation notes
- Add --attest to the existing while/case argument parser (follows --source-file and --restart pattern)
- Extract worktree ID from the basename of the worktree-artifacts-dir path
- The attest_source field is a new line appended after tested_files in the status file
- When --attest is provided, skip the entire test discovery and execution path
- Compute diff hash AFTER all staging is complete (per epic scenario analysis)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] record-test-status.sh accepts --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> flag
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q 'attest' || bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh --attest /nonexistent 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] --attest writes test-gate-status with status=passed when source is passing
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_writes_passed_status.*PASS'
- [ ] --attest writes attest_source field in test-gate-status
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_includes_attest_source.*PASS'
- [ ] --attest refuses when source status missing or failed
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_refuses_missing_source.*PASS'
- [ ] All attest tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-attest.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified
